description: Following an annual shareholder meeting, a corporate paralegal needs to update the official corporate minute book.

nodes.task_description: Gather all relevant documents from the annual meeting: agenda, signed minutes, and any resolutions passed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has all the necessary documents.

nodes.task_description: Add the new documents to the corporate minute book in the correct section and chronological order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly files the new records.

nodes.task_description: Update the index of the minute book to reflect the newly added documents.

expected_outcome.expected: The minute book's index is now current.
